$storeKey..write: !data.exists() || (newData.child('_sessionToken').exists() && root.child('app_store/active_sessions/' + newData.child('_sessionToken').val()).exists() && root.child('app_store/active_sessions/' + newData.child('_sessionToken').val() + '/storeKey').val() == $storeKey && root.child('app_store/active_sessions/' + newData.child('_sessionToken').val() + '/expiresAt').val() > now)
